title: Sienar Ships

|parent=[[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]]<ref name="DB-Parent">In the entry for the [[TIE/sr starfighter|TIE scout]] on the [[Databank (original)|original StarWars.com databank]], it was stated that [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] negotiated for a civilian model of the craft to be sold. As [[Sienar Ships]] has been established as the manufacturer of the [[Lone Scout-A]], it follows that Sienar Ships is a subsidiary of Santhe/Sienar Technologies.</ref>
|subsid=
|headquarters=
|locations=
|role=[[Starshipwright]]<ref name="RPG2">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition]]</ref>

*[[Mark I Bulk Transport]]<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>

'''Sienar Ships''' was a subsidiary of [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]]<ref name="DB-Parent" /> that manufactured [[Starship/Legends|starships]]<ref name="RPG2" /> including those intended for the civilian market.<ref name="DB">{{DB|starship|tiescout|TIE scout}}</ref> The company's products included the [[Mark I Bulk Transport]]<ref name="CRO" /> and the [[Lone Scout-A]].<ref name="RPG2" />
